description: Comprehensive monitoring dashboard for AWS Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka (MSK) clusters. Covers cluster health, throughput, request performance, storage, consumer groups, CPU/memory utilization, replication, and client connections using CloudWatch and JMX metrics exported via Prometheus and collected by OpenTelemetry Collector.
title: AWS MSK Cluster Monitoring

cluster_name.name: cluster_name
cluster_name.queryValue: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM 'aws_kafka_activecontrollercount' WITH KEY = 'ClusterName'

broker_id.name: broker_id
broker_id.queryValue: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM 'aws_kafka_bytesinpersec' WITH KEY = 'BrokerId'

topic.name: topic
topic.queryValue: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM 'aws_kafka_messagesinpersec' WITH KEY = 'Topic'

consumer_group.name: consumer_group
consumer_group.queryValue: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM 'aws_kafka_sumoffsetlag' WITH KEY = 'ConsumerGroup'

widgets.description: High-level health indicators for your AWS MSK cluster including controller status, partition health, and ZooKeeper metrics
widgets.title: Cluster Overview

widgets.description: Number of active controllers in the cluster. Should always be 1.
widgets.title: Active Controller Count

widgets.description: Number of partitions that are offline. Should be 0.
widgets.title: Offline Partitions

widgets.description: Number of under-replicated partitions. Non-zero indicates replication lag.
widgets.title: Under-Replicated Partitions

widgets.description: Partitions where ISR count is below min.insync.replicas. Critical alert condition.
widgets.title: Under Min ISR Partitions

widgets.description: Total number of topics across the cluster
widgets.title: Global Topic Count

widgets.description: Total number of partitions across all topics in the cluster
widgets.title: Global Partition Count

widgets.description: Mean ZooKeeper request latency in milliseconds
widgets.title: ZooKeeper Request Latency (Mean)

widgets.description: ZooKeeper session state. 0 = not connected, 1 = connected
widgets.title: ZooKeeper Session Expiry Rate

widgets.description: Active controller count over time. Drops to 0 indicate leader election events.
widgets.title: Active Controller Count Over Time

widgets.description: Under-replicated partitions by broker over time
widgets.title: Under-Replicated Partitions Over Time

widgets.description: Offline partition count trend. Any value > 0 is critical.
widgets.title: Offline Partitions Over Time

widgets.description: ZooKeeper request latency percentiles by broker
widgets.title: ZooKeeper Request Latency Over Time

widgets.description: Number of partitions per broker. Imbalance indicates need for partition reassignment.
widgets.title: Partition Count by Broker

widgets.description: Number of partition leaders per broker. Should be evenly distributed.
widgets.title: Leader Count by Broker

widgets.description: Message and byte throughput metrics for producers and consumers across the MSK cluster
widgets.title: Throughput

widgets.description: Rate of incoming messages per second by broker
widgets.title: Messages In Per Second

widgets.description: Rate of incoming messages per second by topic
widgets.title: Messages In Per Second (by Topic)

widgets.description: Incoming byte rate per broker
widgets.title: Bytes In Per Second

widgets.description: Outgoing byte rate per broker
widgets.title: Bytes Out Per Second

widgets.description: Incoming bytes per second broken down by topic
widgets.title: Bytes In Per Second (by Topic)

widgets.description: Outgoing bytes per second broken down by topic
widgets.title: Bytes Out Per Second (by Topic)

widgets.description: Rate of produce message format conversions. High values indicate clients using old message formats.
widgets.title: Produce Message Conversions/sec

widgets.description: Rate of fetch message format conversions. High values indicate consumers using old message formats.
widgets.title: Fetch Message Conversions/sec

widgets.description: Bytes per second incoming from other brokers for replication
widgets.title: Replication Bytes In/sec

widgets.description: Bytes per second outgoing to other brokers for replication
widgets.title: Replication Bytes Out/sec

widgets.description: Cluster-wide aggregate bytes in vs bytes out
widgets.title: Total Bytes In vs Out (Cluster)

widgets.description: Cluster-wide aggregate message ingestion rate
widgets.title: Total Messages In (Cluster)

widgets.description: Kafka broker request handling latency and handler utilization metrics
widgets.title: Request Performance

widgets.description: Mean time the leader spends processing produce requests at the partition level
widgets.title: Produce Local Time (Mean)

widgets.description: Mean time to process produce requests including network time
widgets.title: Produce Request Time (Mean)

widgets.description: Mean total time for produce requests end-to-end
widgets.title: Produce Total Time (Mean)

widgets.description: Mean time produce responses spend in the response queue
widgets.title: Produce Response Queue Time (Mean)

widgets.description: Mean time the leader spends processing fetch consumer requests
widgets.title: Fetch Consumer Local Time (Mean)

widgets.description: Mean request time for fetch consumer operations
widgets.title: Fetch Consumer Request Time (Mean)

widgets.description: Mean total time for consumer fetch requests
widgets.title: Fetch Consumer Total Time (Mean)

widgets.description: Mean time consumer fetch responses spend in the response queue
widgets.title: Fetch Consumer Response Queue Time

widgets.description: Mean time the leader spends processing fetch follower requests (replication)
widgets.title: Fetch Follower Local Time (Mean)

widgets.description: Mean total time for follower fetch requests (replication)
widgets.title: Fetch Follower Total Time (Mean)

widgets.description: Average fraction of time request handler threads are idle. Below 0.3 (30%) indicates saturation.
widgets.title: Request Handler Avg Idle %

widgets.description: Average fraction of time network processor threads are idle. Below 0.3 (30%) indicates network saturation.
widgets.title: Network Processor Avg Idle %

widgets.description: Mean request size in bytes
widgets.title: Request Bytes Mean

widgets.description: Mean response size in bytes
widgets.title: Response Bytes Mean

widgets.description: Disk usage metrics for Kafka data logs, application logs, and root volumes
widgets.title: Storage

widgets.description: Percentage of disk space used by Kafka data logs per broker
widgets.title: Kafka Data Logs Disk Used

widgets.description: Percentage of disk space used by Kafka application logs per broker
widgets.title: Kafka App Logs Disk Used

widgets.description: Root volume disk usage percentage per broker
widgets.title: Root Disk Used

widgets.description: Peak Kafka data disk usage across all brokers
widgets.title: Kafka Data Logs Disk Used (Value)

widgets.description: Peak root disk usage across all brokers
widgets.title: Root Disk Used (Value)

widgets.description: Number of partitions per broker. High partition count increases memory and disk overhead.
widgets.title: Partition Count by Broker (Storage)

widgets.description: Number of log segments per broker. High counts may indicate retention policy issues.
widgets.title: Log Segment Count by Broker

widgets.description: Estimated maximum time lag. High values indicate consumers falling behind which can lead to disk pressure.
widgets.title: Estimated Max Time Lag (Storage View)

widgets.description: Average time produce requests are throttled. Non-zero indicates quota enforcement or disk pressure.
widgets.title: Produce Throttle Time

widgets.description: Consumer group lag and health metrics for monitoring consumer performance
widgets.title: Consumer Group

widgets.description: Maximum offset lag across all partitions for each consumer group. High lag indicates slow consumers.
widgets.title: Max Offset Lag

widgets.description: Total offset lag across all partitions for each consumer group
widgets.title: Sum Offset Lag

widgets.description: Estimated maximum time lag in seconds. How far behind the consumer group is from the latest message.
widgets.title: Estimated Max Time Lag

widgets.description: Peak max offset lag across all consumer groups
widgets.title: Max Offset Lag (Value)

widgets.description: Peak estimated time lag across all consumer groups
widgets.title: Estimated Max Time Lag (Value)

widgets.description: Total offset lag across all consumer groups and partitions
widgets.title: Sum Offset Lag (Value)

widgets.description: Offset lag broken down by consumer group and topic for detailed analysis
widgets.title: Offset Lag by Topic-Partition

widgets.description: Number of partitions being consumed by each consumer group
widgets.title: Consumer Group Partition Count

widgets.description: Average fetch throttle time. Non-zero values indicate consumer quota enforcement.
widgets.title: Fetch Throttle Time

widgets.description: Broker-level compute resource utilization including CPU, memory, swap, and network I/O
widgets.title: CPU & Memory

widgets.description: Percentage of CPU time spent in user space per broker
widgets.title: CPU User %

widgets.description: Percentage of CPU time spent in kernel/system space per broker
widgets.title: CPU System %

widgets.description: Percentage of CPU time spent idle per broker. Low idle indicates high utilization.
widgets.title: CPU Idle %

widgets.description: CPU utilization breakdown averaged across all brokers in the cluster
widgets.title: CPU Breakdown (Cluster Average)

widgets.description: CPU IOWait percentage. High values indicate disk I/O bottleneck.
widgets.title: CPU IOWait %

widgets.description: Memory used per broker in bytes
widgets.title: Memory Used

widgets.description: Free memory per broker in bytes
widgets.title: Memory Free

widgets.description: Buffered and cached memory by broker. Kafka relies heavily on page cache for performance.
widgets.title: Memory Buffered & Cached

widgets.description: Swap space usage per broker. Any swap usage can severely degrade Kafka performance.
widgets.title: Swap Used

widgets.description: Available swap space per broker
widgets.title: Swap Free

widgets.description: Network receive packet rate per broker
widgets.title: Network RX Packets/sec

widgets.description: Network transmit packet rate per broker
widgets.title: Network TX Packets/sec

widgets.description: Network receive dropped packets per broker. Non-zero indicates network issues.
widgets.title: Network RX Dropped

widgets.description: Network transmit dropped packets per broker. Non-zero indicates network issues.
widgets.title: Network TX Dropped

widgets.description: Network receive error rate per broker
widgets.title: Network RX Errors

widgets.description: Network transmit error rate per broker
widgets.title: Network TX Errors

widgets.description: Kafka replication health metrics including ISR dynamics, leader distribution, and partition reassignment status
widgets.title: Replication

widgets.description: Rate of ISR shrink events per broker. Frequent shrinks indicate brokers failing to keep up with replication.
widgets.title: ISR Shrink Rate

widgets.description: Rate of ISR expand events per broker. Should follow ISR shrinks as replicas catch up.
widgets.title: ISR Expand Rate

widgets.description: Partitions below min.insync.replicas. Critical: producers with acks=all will fail for these partitions.
widgets.title: Under Min ISR Partition Count

widgets.description: Partitions at exactly min.insync.replicas. One more replica loss would put them under min ISR.
widgets.title: At Min ISR Partition Count

widgets.description: Leader count per broker. Uneven distribution indicates preferred leader election should be triggered.
widgets.title: Leader Count Distribution

widgets.description: Percentage of partitions where the preferred replica is not the leader. High values indicate sub-optimal leader distribution.
widgets.title: Preferred Replica Imbalance

widgets.description: Whether partition reassignment is currently in progress. 1 = yes, 0 = no.
widgets.title: Partition Reassignment In Progress

widgets.description: Under-replicated partitions by broker. Persistent non-zero values indicate replication issues.
widgets.title: Under-Replicated Partitions (Replication View)

widgets.description: Replication traffic in vs out by broker. Asymmetric traffic may indicate unbalanced partition assignment.
widgets.title: Replication Bytes In vs Out (by Broker)

widgets.description: Rate of failed replication requests per broker. Non-zero indicates replication pipeline issues.
widgets.title: Failed Replication Rate

widgets.description: Client connection metrics including connection counts, creation/close rates, and authentication errors
widgets.title: Connections

widgets.description: Number of active connections per broker
widgets.title: Connection Count

widgets.description: Total active connections across all brokers
widgets.title: Connection Count (Value)

widgets.description: Rate of new client connections per broker. Spikes may indicate connection churn issues.
widgets.title: Connection Creation Rate

widgets.description: Rate of client connection closures per broker
widgets.title: Connection Close Rate

widgets.description: Cluster-wide connection creation vs close rate. Sustained imbalance indicates connection leak or churn.
widgets.title: Connection Creation vs Close Rate

widgets.description: SASL/IAM authentication failure rate per broker. Non-zero indicates misconfigured client credentials.
widgets.title: Client Auth Errors (SASL)

widgets.description: Successful client authentication rate per broker
widgets.title: Client Auth Success Rate

widgets.description: Total authentication failures across the cluster
widgets.title: Auth Error Rate (Value)

widgets.description: TLS handshake failure rate per broker
widgets.title: TLS Handshake Errors

widgets.description: Tabular view of connection count per broker for quick comparison
widgets.title: Connection Count by Broker (Table)

widgets.description: Rate at which produce requests are throttled per broker due to quota enforcement
widgets.title: Produce Throttle Byte Rate
